title: frangula californica subsp. occidentalis
intro: Frangula californica subsp. occidentalis, also known as California coffee plant, is a shrub-like plant native to the western United States, particularly in the Pacific coastal region. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Frangula californica subsp. occidentalis include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Frangula californica subsp. occidentalis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to leverage its medicinal properties.
